article_title: Bylaw 14770 — Housing Agreement (5938 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Affordable Rental Units at 5938 Olive Avenue Through Legal Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14770 in November 2025, legally binding developer Olive Properties Inc. to provide non-market rental units (below-market-rate apartments reserved for lower-income households) as part of a new mixed development at 5938 Olive Avenue. The agreement is registered on the property title, meaning the affordable housing rules stay attached to the land permanently, regardless of future ownership.
briefs.action_required: If you are a landlord or developer in Burnaby, review any housing agreement obligations tied to your property title.
